proguard.classfile.util

Interface InvalidReferenceVisitor

  • All Superinterfaces:
    InvalidClassReferenceVisitor, InvalidMemberReferenceVisitor

    public interface InvalidReferenceVisitor
extends InvalidClassReferenceVisitor, InvalidMemberReferenceVisitor
    A visitor for invalid references.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface proguard.classfile.util.InvalidClassReferenceVisitor

        visitMissingClass, visitProgramDependency

      • Methods inherited from interface proguard.classfile.util.InvalidMemberReferenceVisitor

        visitAnyMissingField, visitAnyMissingMember, visitAnyMissingMethod, visitMissingEnclosingMethod, visitMissingLibraryField, visitMissingLibraryMethod, visitMissingProgramField, visitMissingProgramMethod
